title: f-pack!
description: minecraft, by fran! in (very) early development :^)
body:
f-pack! is a resource pack aiming for a muted, fantastical, and rustic tone to Minecraft. As of April 2026, this pack is still in development, a lot of textures aren't done/implemented yet!.
for more frequent progress updates, check here:
https://x.com/mirrorheadradio


![an assortment of flowers from the pack, some potted, some strewn on the ground, all at the side of a river](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/e65944d4ba4fbfa5065adcea62b6ac8e14867ec5_0.webp)
